commands.review_summary:
This PR renames and internalizes the former Pi agent runtime into OpenClaw-owned core/runtime packages while updating SDK, provider/plugin, docs, workflow, dependency, and test surfaces.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main documents and uses `pi`, while PR head does not map that token and lowercases arbitrary runtime ids. I did not run an installed OpenClaw runtime path.
